Interface InputHandler.MultiplayerCallbacks

Enclosing class:
InputHandler
public static interface InputHandler.MultiplayerCallbacks
Callback interface for multiplayer actions. Defines methods that the InputHandler can call to execute game actions and query game state in multiplayer mode for both players.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    checkBothReady()
    Checks if both players are ready and starts the game if they are.
    InputEventListener
    getEventListener1()
    Gets the event listener for player 1's game move events.
    InputEventListener
    getEventListener2()
    Gets the event listener for player 2's game move events.
    javafx.animation.Timeline
    getTimeline1()
    Gets the timeline used for controlling player 1's game speed and soft drop rate.
    javafx.animation.Timeline
    getTimeline2()
    Gets the timeline used for controlling player 2's game speed and soft drop rate.
    boolean
    isGameOver1()
    Checks if player 1's game is over.
    boolean
    isGameOver2()
    Checks if player 2's game is over.
    boolean
    isGameStarted()
    Checks if the multiplayer game has started.
    boolean
    isMultiplayerMode()
    Checks if the game is in multiplayer mode.
    boolean
    isPaused()
    Checks if the multiplayer game is currently paused.
    boolean
    isPlayer1Ready()
    Checks if player 1 is ready to start the game.
    boolean
    isPlayer2Ready()
    Checks if player 2 is ready to start the game.
    void
    moveDown(MoveEvent event, int playerNumber)
    Moves the current piece down by one unit for the specified player.
    void
    pauseGame()
    Toggles the pause state of the multiplayer game.
    void
    playLineClear()
    Plays the line clear sound effect.
    void
    refreshBrick(ViewData viewData, int playerNumber)
    Refreshes the brick display for the specified player with updated view data.
    void
    setPlayer1Ready(boolean ready)
    Sets the ready state for player 1.
    void
    setPlayer2Ready(boolean ready)
    Sets the ready state for player 2.
    void
    updateReadyLabels()
    Updates the ready status labels in the UI to reflect current ready states.
    void
    updateTimelineRate(int playerNumber)
    Updates the timeline rate to normal speed for the specified player (resets soft drop rate).

  • Method Details

    • isMultiplayerMode

      boolean isMultiplayerMode()
      Checks if the game is in multiplayer mode.
      Returns:
      True if in multiplayer mode, false otherwise

    • isGameStarted

      boolean isGameStarted()
      Checks if the multiplayer game has started.
      Returns:
      True if the game has started, false if players are in ready state

    • isPaused

      boolean isPaused()
      Checks if the multiplayer game is currently paused.
      Returns:
      True if the game is paused, false otherwise

    • isGameOver1

      boolean isGameOver1()
      Checks if player 1's game is over.
      Returns:
      True if player 1 has lost, false otherwise

    • isGameOver2

      boolean isGameOver2()
      Checks if player 2's game is over.
      Returns:
      True if player 2 has lost, false otherwise

    • isPlayer1Ready

      boolean isPlayer1Ready()
      Checks if player 1 is ready to start the game.
      Returns:
      True if player 1 is ready, false otherwise

    • isPlayer2Ready

      boolean isPlayer2Ready()
      Checks if player 2 is ready to start the game.
      Returns:
      True if player 2 is ready, false otherwise

    • setPlayer1Ready

      void setPlayer1Ready(boolean ready)
      Sets the ready state for player 1.
      Parameters:
      ready - True to mark player 1 as ready, false otherwise

    • setPlayer2Ready

      void setPlayer2Ready(boolean ready)
      Sets the ready state for player 2.
      Parameters:
      ready - True to mark player 2 as ready, false otherwise

    • getEventListener1

      InputEventListener getEventListener1()
      Gets the event listener for player 1's game move events.
      Returns:
      The InputEventListener instance for player 1

    • getEventListener2

      InputEventListener getEventListener2()
      Gets the event listener for player 2's game move events.
      Returns:
      The InputEventListener instance for player 2

    • getTimeline1

      javafx.animation.Timeline getTimeline1()
      Gets the timeline used for controlling player 1's game speed and soft drop rate.
      Returns:
      The Timeline instance controlling player 1's animation speed

    • getTimeline2

      javafx.animation.Timeline getTimeline2()
      Gets the timeline used for controlling player 2's game speed and soft drop rate.
      Returns:
      The Timeline instance controlling player 2's animation speed

    • refreshBrick

      void refreshBrick(ViewData viewData, int playerNumber)
      Refreshes the brick display for the specified player with updated view data.
      Parameters:
      viewData - The updated view data containing brick position and state
      playerNumber - The player number (1 or 2) whose display should be refreshed

    • moveDown

      void moveDown(MoveEvent event, int playerNumber)
      Moves the current piece down by one unit for the specified player.
      Parameters:
      event - The move event containing event type and source information
      playerNumber - The player number (1 or 2) whose piece should move down

    • pauseGame

      void pauseGame()
      Toggles the pause state of the multiplayer game.

    • playLineClear

      void playLineClear()
      Plays the line clear sound effect.

    • updateTimelineRate

      void updateTimelineRate(int playerNumber)
      Updates the timeline rate to normal speed for the specified player (resets soft drop rate).
      Parameters:
      playerNumber - The player number (1 or 2) whose timeline rate should be updated

    • updateReadyLabels

      void updateReadyLabels()
      Updates the ready status labels in the UI to reflect current ready states.

    • checkBothReady

      void checkBothReady()
      Checks if both players are ready and starts the game if they are.
